prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Renault Sport M9T 2.3L twin-turbo diesel (engine code: M9T 880)** with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Manley H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and a **Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger** (82mm compressor, 1.06 A/R turbine housing) running 2.2 bar of boost on a **Syvecs S8 ECU** with flex-fuel mapping for E85 compatibility. Supporting mods include a **PWR Performance intercooler (400x200x120mm core)**, **Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors**, and a **Radium Engineering fuel surge tank** with dual **Walbro 450 LPH pumps**.

Full **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** with 8-position adjustable damping, **Eibach ERS 1000N/mm helper springs**, and **SuperPro polybushings** (front control arms, subframe, and rear trailing arms) for chassis rigidity. Braking upgraded to **AP Racing CP8660 6-piston calipers** (380mm two-piece rotors front, 355mm rear) with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge 6AN braided lines**.

Drivetrain reinforcement with a **PPG 6-speed sequential gearbox (dog-ring type)** mated to a **Penske 8760 LSD** (4.11 final drive ratio). Clutch system upgraded to a **Tilton 7.25" triple-plate ceramic clutch** with a **Nuke Performance hydraulic release bearing**. Lightweight **BBS RG-R 18x9.5" ET30 wheels** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (265/35/18)** tires for optimal grip.
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit** (custom-fabricated to fit the T Hi-Tec’s chassis) with **carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser**, all finished in **3M Matte Military Green (212-62)**. The rear wing is a **custom 1-piece carbon fiber GT-style spoiler** (2.2m span, adjustable angle) from **Seibon Carbon**.

**Recaro SPG XL bucket seats** (FIA 8862-2009 certified) with **Schroth 6-point harnesses** and a **custom bolt-in roll cage** (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, 6-point with gusseted rear strut tower braces) from **Custom Cages UK**. Interior stripped of all non-essential weight, with **carbon fiber door cards, dashboard overlay, and center console** from **VIS Racing**.

**Hella Rallye 3000 Super Whites (7")** with **custom LED DRL halos** and **Morimoto XB LED fog lights** mounted in a **custom aluminum front bumper** (replacing the OEM unit). Exhaust exits via a **custom 3.5" titanium dual-exit system** (straight-pipe, no mufflers) with **Burns Stainless merge collectors** and **Vibrant 1799 resonators** for drone reduction.
